message:
test(release-gates): add 9 tests for serde roundtrip, summary, edge cases

Cover under-tested release_readiness_gates module:
- render_summary includes [PASS]/[FAIL] icons and action lines
- render_summary ready report has no action lines
- wrong pane_scales blocks soak confidence gate
- backpressure not exercised blocks performance budget gate
- serde roundtrips for Report, Inputs, and Policy types
- failed_count matches actual failures (all 4 gates failing)
- finish_line policy defaults are correct

14 total tests (5 existing + 9 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
